description: A design sketch on white paper showing a repeating pattern of green triangular or dome-shaped forms arranged in rows, interspersed with small black squares. A dotted border line runs across the top. The forms are painted in varying shades of green with loose, gestural brushwork. Handwritten text in German appears at the bottom. The overall composition is a decorative wall pattern study.

_meta.title: Draft for wall decoration in the living room of the apartment in Berlin Stonborough
